2024-10-30T16:41:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of King's Road (Causeway Bay bound) near Cheung Hong Street is closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-30T16:41:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，英皇道(往銅鑼灣方向)近長康街的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-30T17:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of King's Road (Causeway Bay bound) near Cheung Hong Street is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is congested now.
2024-10-30T17:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，英皇道(往銅鑼灣方向)近長康街的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-10-30T17:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Texaco Road (Tsuen Kam Interchange bound) near Circle Park is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-30T17:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，德士古道(往荃錦交匯處方向)近圓環公園的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。
